name: GAIA Benchmark
description: Benchmark for general AI assistants that evaluates real-world question answering requiring reasoning, multimodal understanding, web browsing, and tool use.

name: Bullshit Benchmark
description: Benchmark evaluating whether models detect conceptual nonsense and unsupported claims.
expected_output: Free-form answer identifying whether the statement is nonsense or valid
evaluation_techniques: Three LLM judges aggregated via mean score

name: SpreadsheetBench / SpreadsheetBench Verified
description: Challenging spreadsheet manipulation benchmark derived from real-world scenarios
evaluation_techniques: Programmatic comparison of generated vs expected spreadsheet output

name: DRACO
description: Reasoning and validation benchmark focused on detecting plausible but incorrect or non-existent frameworks, methods, and claims
expected_output: Structured critique identifying incorrect or fabricated concepts
evaluation_techniques: Rubric-based evaluation using structured scoring (0-2) with emphasis on hallucination detection
